channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: West Ham latest: 'Bowen commits immediate future to club'
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football

item.title: I got my running mate’s number from someone, says Hamzat
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Lagos Deputy Governor Obafemi Hamzat shares how he got his running mate, Damilola Sonayon-James’, phone number after her selection for the 2027 election.
Read More: https://punchng.com/i-got-my-running-mates-number-from-someone-says-hamzat/

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Growing up in Ijebu-Ode, my responsibility included joining other children in protecting respective family hens and their chicks from predators. A practical proverbial guide directed our efforts: one must first drive away the eagle before counting the chicks. This meant being prepared with stones an

item.title: She Was Like a Daughter to Me: Umahi Rejects Allegations Over Nurse Habila’s Death
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Minister of Works, David Umahi, has rejected allegations of foul play surrounding the death of Nurse Mary Habila, describing attempts to link him to the incident as an effort to politicise an unfortunate situation. Umahi, who addressed journalists in Abuja on Thursday, said Habila was a valued membe

item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: Veteran Nollywood actor Jide Kosoko has appealed to Nigerians to be patient with President Bola Tinubu’s administration, stressing that the President should not be judged before the full impact of his policies and reforms can be assessed. Speaking in an interview with FeelrightnewsTV, Kosoko compare

item.title: Transfer: Super Falcons forward joins Swedish champions BK Häcken
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Super Falcons forward, Joy Omewa, has completed a move to Swedish champions BK Häcken, DAILY POST reports. According to Swedish news outlet, STV, Häcken have already finalised the deal for the free agent. Omewa was released by  English second division club Nottingham Forest last month foll

item.title: Ebola: Seven Americans quarantined at Kenya facility despite court suspension
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: Seven American aid workers who responded to the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo are quarantining at a U.S.-backed isolation facility in Kenya despite a court order suspending activities at the site, according to Reuters. item.title: Who are Russia's 3,000 African army recruits fighting in Ukraine?
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Russia continues to recruit Africans to fight on the front in Ukraine. The Stop Russian Recruiters platform, which is linked to Urkaine's Ministry of Defence, has now identified nearly 3,000 recruits. Around one in six has already been killed. Among the countries most affected are Cameroon, Ghana, E

item.title: Trump reviving election fraud claims to contest midterm results, say Democrats
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Donald Trump is reviving his long-running claims about the security of US elections. In a primetime address, the president accused China of what he called the largest election data breach in history. He also released documents he says reveal foreign interference, despite intelligence officials sayin

item.title: US launches sixth straight night of strikes on Iran as conflict escalates
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The United States has carried out a sixth consecutive night of military strikes on Iran, further intensifying the conflict as Tehran accused Washington of attacking civilian infrastructure and broadened its retaliatory operations across the Middle East. item.description: Tehran says the US strikes hit bridges, while the US boards a ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: FG Renames Lagos-Calabar Coastal Highway After Tinubu
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The federal government has renamed the Lagos-Calabar Coastal Highway after President Bola Tinubu, citing his role in conceiving the idea of the landmark infrastructure project nearly three decades ago. Minister of Works, David Umahi, announced the decision on Thursday during a media briefing in Abuj

item.description: [RFI] G7 foreign ministers and the European Union's foreign policy chief on Wednesday urged Sudan's Rapid Support Forces and allied armed groups to halt all actions that could lead to further atrocities or endanger civilians in El-Obeid.

item.title: 2026 UTME Top Scorer Daniella Owoeye Receives ₦1m Scholarship
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The overall best candidate in the 2026 Unified Tertiary Matriculation Examination (UTME), Daniella Owoeye Jesudunsin, has been awarded a ₦1 million scholarship by the Ekiti Parapo in Indiana, United States, in recognition of her outstanding performance in the national examination. Owoeye disclosed t

item.title: FUTA urges quality over quantity in university education
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
FUTA advocates for quality over quantity in Nigerian university education, warning against ‘degree mills’ and urging focus on skilled graduates.
Read More: https://punchng.com/futa-urges-quality-over-quantity-in-university-education/

item.title: Sophia Momodu threatens N10bn lawsuit against Caroline Hutchings over Snapchat post
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The businesswoman threatened legal action after alleging that a Snapchat post by Ms Hutchings damaged her reputation despite not mentioning her by name. The post Sophia Momodu threatens N10bn lawsuit against Caroline Hutchings over Snapchat post appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: 10 things to know before Spain-Argentina final in New York
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: From the viral photo of Lionel Messi with baby Lamine Yamal to Donald Trump's presence and the NFL-style half-time show.

item.title: Dangote Refinery $4.43bn Crude Import Signals Failure Of Naira-Crude Initiative – Expert
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The sustained import of about 39.9 million barrels of crude at a combined cost of approximately $4.43 billion in May and June by Dangote refinery is an indication of Nigeria’s crude-for-naira policy failure. Oil and gas expert and public affairs analyst, Victor Udoh, while speaking to the policy unc

item.title: Promote Exclusive Breastfeeding To Curb Stunting, CS-SUNN Appeals
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Civil Society Scaling Up Nutrition in Nigeria (CS-SUNN) has appealed to parents, especially mothers, to promote exclusive breastfeeding for their children as part of efforts to curb the rate of stunting in Tafawa Balewa Local Government Area of Bauchi State. The appeal was made by the Borno Stat

item.title: Dangote Taps $2.5 Billion in Private Share Placement Before IPO
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Aliko Dangote has nearly completed a $2.5 billion private stock placement for his refinery business, according to people familiar with the matter, as the company prepares for Africa’s largest initial public offering.

item.title: I Owe My Life to the Commodore 64
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://www.goto10retro.com/p/i-owe-my-life-to-the-commodore-64 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48945260 Points: 11 # Comments: 0

item.title: Investors at UBA business series identify Africa’s next billion-dollar opportunities
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: Africa’s Global Bank, United Bank for Africa (UBA) Plc, has hosted another impactful edition of its quarterly UBA Business Series, bringing together entrepreneurs, investors, innovators and business leaders to explore how customer insights and technology is shaping Africa’s next generati

item.title: Israel headed for October election as parliament dissolved
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: PM Netanyahu’s political survival at stake as Knesset dissolves before the vote.

item.title: Zodiac II Lyrics by Cheque & Blaqbonez
item.dc:creator: NotJustOk
item.description: Cheque and Blaqbonez Lyrics Zodiac II by Cheque and Blaqbonez is a vibrant Afrobeats and hip-hop collaboration that celebrates ambition, luxury, and romantic attraction, the lyrics reflect the artists' desire for a comfortable "soft life," emphasizing that their success and financial achievements ar

item.title: Bala Mohammed Reshuffles Cabinet, Drops Two Commissioners
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Governor Bala Abdulkadir Mohammed has approved a minor reshuffle of the Bauchi State Executive Council, resulting in the exit of two commissioners and the acceptance of the resignation of another. This is contained in a press statement issued on Friday by the Governor’s Special Adviser on Medi

item.title: Coca-Cola Suspends Fairlife U.S. Production After Ransomware Attack
item.dc:creator: TechEconomy
item.description: Coca-Cola has temporarily suspended Fairlife production across the United States after a ransomware attack disrupted its production systems. The post Coca-Cola Suspends Fairlife U.S. Production After Ransomware Attack appeared first on Tech | Business | Economy.

item.title: NIMC takes over PKI as NITDA hands over digital identity security infrastructure
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: The National Information Technology Development Agency (NITDA) has transferred its Public Key Infrastructure (PKI) framework to the National Identity Management Commission (NIMC) in a move aimed at strengthening the security of Nigeria's digital identity ecosystem. The post NIMC takes over PKI as NI

item.title: Citi’s Manthey Says Broadening Requires Sharp Stock Rotations
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Sharp stock rotations are necessary for the equity rally to broaden beyond the tech sector, according to Citigroup Inc.’s Beata Manthey.
